mapper.select: select id, model_id, version, gray_percent, status from model_versions where model_id = #{modelId} order by id desc
select id, model_id, version, gray_percent, status from model_versions where model_id = #{modelId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into model_versions(model_id, version, gray_percent, status) values(#{modelId}, #{version}, #{grayPercent}, #{status})
mapper.update: update model_versions set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
